ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Air Temperature, Wind Speed) */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "range" TEXT /* Measurement range of the sensor */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor deployment */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station where the sensor is deployed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was deployed */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was decommissioned (if applicable) */,
  "calibration_interval" INTEGER /* Interval between calibrations (in days) */,
  "last_calibration_technician" TEXT /* Technician who performed the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the deployment (e.g., active, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_deployments_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "hs" REAL /* Heat storage (HS) value */,
  "wind_dir" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "sw_glob" INTEGER /* Global solar radiation (W/m^2) */,
  "sw_out" INTEGER /* Outgoing solar radiation (W/m^2) */,
  "air_t" REAL /* Air temperature (°C) */,
  "rh" INTEGER /* Relative humidity (%) */,
  "wind_sp" REAL /* Wind speed (m/s) */,
  "hn" REAL /* Snow height (m) */,
  "iprec" REAL /* Precipitation (mm) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data (e.g., valid, suspect, invalid) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data flag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being flagged */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of the flag (e.g., Missing, Outlier) */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date when the flag was set */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the flag */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the flag was resolved */,
  "resolution_note" TEXT /* Note describing the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_flags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_flags_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the readme file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID to track user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_export_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station from which data is requested */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the data export */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the data export */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the export request */,
  "approver" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_requests_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_requests_approver FOREIGN KEY ("approver") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_export_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third-party integration */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the third-party data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the third-party data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* Specific API endpoint for data retrieval */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data synchronization (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data synchronization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)
